spec.title: My Project — Product Spec
spec.lede: Replace this with your product's PRD. Run /rm-prd to generate it from an idea brief, or edit PM/data/spec.json directly.

blocks.html: Describe the product in a paragraph: who it's for, the pain it removes, and the north star. Then expand with personas, requirements, and metrics — /rm-prd can do this for you.
List what you are explicitly not doing in this version. The most-skipped section is the most valuable one.

doc-t1.title: Editing the hub
doc-t1.html: Edit the four files in PM/data/, then run rocketman build. Never edit PM/index.html directly — it's generated. See PM/CLAUDE.md for the conventions.
